active.name: Bulwark Slam
active.rawText: Deals 18 (+50% HP) damage to the closest enemy and gains 20 (+25% HP) Shield.

passives.name: Last Stand
passives.rawText: When this hero would die, instead survive with 1 HP once per combat.

passives.name: Taunting Roar
passives.rawText: At the start of combat, force the nearest enemy to target this hero for 2 turns.

passives.name: Reserve Guard
passives.rawText: While benched, the frontmost ally gains 10% HP as Shield at the start of combat.
